creator: henry.hu.sh@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 143392
patch to the port

Update ibus-pinyin to 1.5.0, and remove NO_STAGE.
Part of its functionality is moved to a new port, chinese/pyzy. That is submitted in PR 187797, so please commit that new port before committing this one.
Use compiler:c++11-libs instead of compiler:c++0x. compiler:c++0x is broken on FreeBSD 8/9, because they have a c++0x compiler, but not c++0x standard libs.

redports: https://redports.org/buildarchive/20140605051601-46412/
